title: fabric-import skill: write all candidates as broad + []
description: Update fabric-import skill to write all candidates with relevance_scope=broad, relevance_paths=[]. LLM-driven (not session-driven) imports cannot generate accurate relevance_paths from git history — default broad is safer. Narrowing deferred to user review via fab_review.modify. Cross-cut from C2 (archive Skill) and D1 (CLI plan-context-hint). Anchor: handoff.json#acceptance_criteria 'fabric-import skill writes all candidates with relevance_scope=broad, relevance_paths=[]'.

files.change: Document: every fab_extract_knowledge call from fabric-import sets relevance_scope='broad' and relevance_paths=[]; do NOT attempt path inference from git history; user can narrow via fab_review.modify post-import

implementation: Read current fabric-import SKILL.md to locate candidate pending creation section
Add explicit instruction block: 'All imported candidates use relevance_scope=broad + relevance_paths=[]. Narrowing deferred to fab_review.modify.'
Document rationale inline (LLM cannot accurately bind paths from git diff history)
Cross-link to fabric-review docs for the modify workflow
Verify no implicit narrow-scope language remains in skill template

criteria: fabric-import skill writes all candidates with relevance_scope=broad, relevance_paths=[]
SKILL.md documents rationale (LLM cannot bind paths from git history)
Cross-link to fab_review.modify for post-import narrowing

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure documentation/template update; no server-side enforcement (Skill is Agent-driven prompt)
alternatives_considered: Server-side reject narrow on import path
Heuristic narrow inference from git diff
decision_factors: Per scope.md Q-1 resolution: defer to user review
Server-side enforcement adds complexity for marginal benefit
rationale.tradeoffs: Trust Agent to follow SKILL.md; mitigated by lint #23 narrow_no_paths warning if Agent deviates

manual_checks: Trigger fabric-import on test repo; verify all proposed pending entries have relevance_scope=broad + relevance_paths=[]
success_metrics: 100% broad+[] on import (verified via lint #23 absence post-import)

risks.description: Agent deviates from instruction and adds narrow scope
